## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Product Impact

Explain how this improves AgencyOS AI for agency owners, managers, or agents.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Screenshots Or Demo

Attach screenshots for UI changes.

## Reviewer Notes

Call out security, data model, AI, or blockchain tradeoffs.
